channel.title: Pattaya Gym Directory - Climbing venues
channel.description: Latest climbing venues in the Pattaya Gym Directory.

item.title: Deep Climbing Gym (Harbor Pattaya)
item.description: Pattaya's first indoor climbing gym. Air-conditioned, 10m wall, ocean theme. Top rope, auto-belay, lead, bouldering routes.

item.title: Bean Cow Climbing Gym
item.description: Family-friendly climbing gym. 8m wall. Top rope + lead climbing. CWA-certified teachers, belayer services, top rope safety classes.
